critical_blocker.description: ReapNES_Console.jsfx does not read CC11 (volume) or CC12 (duty). File playback uses ADSR instead of ground-truth per-frame envelopes.
critical_blocker.impact: ALL 1099 projects have wrong volume envelopes during file playback
critical_blocker.fix: Port lp_cc_active[] system from ReapNES_APU.jsfx into Console @block section (~30 lines)

known_regressions.symptom: Wrong noises, missing melodic elements, no drums compared to previous APU-based projects
known_regressions.cause: Switched from APU (reads CC11/CC12) to Console (ignores CC11/CC12)

failed_extractions.reason: 0 MIDIs produced, NSF may have issues

priority_order: 1. Port CC11/CC12 handling to Console synth (fixes all games)
2. Validate drum/noise handling in Console vs APU
3. Rebuild all Projects after synth fix
4. Iterative ear-check and ADSR tuning per game
5. Expand game_adsr.json with more game presets
